generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier and type errors reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid helper declarations within existing AGREE clauses.
Ensure AGREE type declarations use 'int', 'real', or 'bool' for scalar values.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new AADL architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on correcting the contract itself.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
